creator: nabijaczleweli@nabijaczleweli.xyz
text:
I'm the new upstream for all OSSP software (cf. https://sr.ht/~nabijaczleweli/ossp);
the old FTP site is archived at a Mk/bsd.sites.mk-appropriate URL of 
  https://lfs.nabijaczleweli.xyz/0022-OSSP.org-mirror/ftp.ossp.org/ossp-ftp/pkg/%SUBDIR%/
(though I see you already use a third-party mirror,
 so you're insulated against the old upstream's FTP being broken;
 no change needed I suppose).

A more appropriate URL for WWW= stanzas may be one of
  WWW= https://sr.ht/~nabijaczleweli/ossp
  WWW= https://git.sr.ht/~nabijaczleweli/ossp-XXX
  WWW= https://lfs.nabijaczleweli.xyz/0022-OSSP.org-mirror/ftp.ossp.org/ossp-web/pkg/XXX/
respectively pointing to the new upstream project page,
the program/library git page,
or the archive of the original subproject page.

Previously; https://lists.sr.ht/~nabijaczleweli/ossp/%3C563boywip2ooev6xrta4xozn34ugzbj44a4md552femuzi3tch@tarta.nabijaczleweli.xyz%3E
